"'''Crisis'''" is an adventure in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''. It is set in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].

==Plot summary==
Seeking a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] to purge the ''[[FarStar]]''{{'s}} system of programming trapdoors, the corvette heads to [[Pembric II]], a world run by the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], [[Crev Bombaasa/Legends|Crev Bombaasa]]. With information gained from [[Tanquilla Beach/Legends|''Tanquilla Beach'']], they were directed to [[Breslin Drake]], the manager of the [[ThrusterBurn Tapcafe|ThrusterBurn]] [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]]. Running afoul of Bombaasa, the crew of the ''FarStar'', aided by Drake, rescued the young slicer [[Gaelin]] from his clutches and escape the planet. Gaelin gets to work immediately, and removes a lot of the trapdoors, but some still remain as he does not have the skill to recognize them.
